text.title: Instagram Growth Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the single pillar locked in AND ≥28-Reel script batch ready?

branch.question: Is the DM trigger phrase + lead-magnet URL wired and tested?

branch.conclusion: Run playbook: 1-2 Reels/day + daily Stories + 30-min engagement + DM trigger.
Skip launch; wire DM trigger + lead-magnet URL first.
Skip this methodology. Lock pillar + ship 28-Reel batch before daily cadence.

text.example: pillar=(solo-dev, indie-saas) batch=28 dm_trigger=ready → run playbook per r2-daily-reels.
